title: phanera delavayi
intro: Phanera delavayi, also known as the Chinese cork tree, is a species of plant in the family Moraceae, native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phanera delavayi are believed to include lowering cholesterol and blood pressure, as well as improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Phanera delavayi are typically made from the bark and roots of the plant, and are often used in combination with other herbs to create tonics and decoctions for treating various ailments.
